name: IRC_CAMPAIGNS_B
description: Base table for Campaign Management. Stores the basic properties of a Campaign

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: HCM_LIST_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of HCM Audience List.

columns.Name: HCM_LIST_EXTRACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time on which the HCM List was extracted.

columns.Name: RESPONSE_OPTION
columns.Comments: Stores the response option of the get response purpose code of a campaign. Lookup type - ORA_IRC_CAMP_RESPONSE_OPTIONS

columns.Name: ELIG_OBJ_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the eligibility Object Id. Foreign Key to ben_elig_obj_f table

columns.Name: ELIG_PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_CAMP_ELIG_MAPPING table. Stores the Eligibility Profile id.

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_CODE
columns.Comments: Unique code to determine a campaign for a campaign type.

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the status of the campaign. Lookup type - ORA_IRC_CAMP_STATUS

columns.Name: PURPOSE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the purpose of the campaign. Lookup type - ORA_IRC_CAMP_PURPOSE

columns.Name: TARGET_GOAL_VALUE
columns.Comments: Stores the target metric for the campaign to compare against the outcome i.e responses or conversions

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the language in which the campaign will be run i.e when deriving names of the objects like Requisitions etc while sending emails. Will be defaulted to the language of the creator of the campaign.

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of Campaign as lookup code. Lookup type - ORA_IRC_CAMPAIGN_TYPE

columns.Name: SEARCH_REQUISITIONS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether to use saved search for deriving requisitions or getting the static list from IRC_CAMP_REQUISITIONS table. Default value 'N'

columns.Name: REQ_SAVED_SEARCH_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_SAVED_SEARCHES table. Stores the saved search criteria for deriving requisitions associated for a campaign.

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_SAVED_SEARCH_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_SAVED_SEARCHES table. Stores the saved search criteria for deriving audience.

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_POPULATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates if audience is generated for this campaign. Default value 'N'

columns.Name: AUD_REHIRE_ELIG_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if the candidates who are not eligible to be re-hired are ignored for this campaign audience

columns.Name: AUD_EMAIL_LIMIT_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Specifies if email cap is enabled on this campaign audience

columns.Name: ACTIVATED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time on which the campaign was activated

columns.Name: CANCELLED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time on which the campaign was cancelled

columns.Name: CLOSED_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time on which the campaign was closed

columns.Name: VANITY_CONFIG_ID
columns.Comments: Vanity Config Id. Foreign Key to IRC_CAMP_VANITY_CONFIG table

columns.Name: TEAM_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of communications teams table. Foreign key to irc_camp_comm_teams_b

columns.Name: JOURNEY_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Journey

columns.Name: EXCLUDE_JOURNEY_AUD_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates to filter out from final audience, if person has already been assigned to bussiness object item (Journey or Learn).

columns.Name: JOURNEY_COMMUNICATION_GOAL
columns.Comments: Stores the communication goal of journey campaign. Lookup type - ORA_HCO_CAMP_JOURNEY_COMM_GOAL

columns.Name: JOURNEY_ASSIGNED_DATE
columns.Comments: Date on which the journey was assigned

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the audience count of the campaign

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_MEDIUM_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the medium of the campaign. Lookup type - ORA_HCO_CAMP_MEDIUM_TYPE

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CAMPAIGN_DURATION_CODE
columns.Comments: This value is coming from the lookup type: ORA_HCO_CAMPAIGN_DURATION_CODE.
